entry.title: New: RES25-243 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
TO RETAIN THE LEGAL SERVICES OF MCCORRISTON MILLER MUKAI MACKINNON, LLP AS SPECIAL COUNSEL TO REPRESENT DEFENDANT KEITH MITSUYOSHI KANESHIRO IN THE LEGAL ACTION ENTITLED LAUREL J. MAU V. CITY AND COUNTY OF HONOLULU, ETAL.; CIVIL NO. 1:24-CV-00253 GPC-WRP (USDC).

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
